tagline: Building cinematic digital experiences with modern web technologies & AI.
description: Building cinematic digital experiences, scalable systems, and AI-powered products with modern web technologies.

roles.detailed: Cybersecurity Analyst · SOC Engineer · Threat Hunter

bio: Cybersecurity Professional and Web Developer with experience in malware analysis, vulnerability assessments, threat hunting, SIEM tools, and SOC environments, alongside full-stack web application development. Skilled in identifying security risks, reverse engineering, and building secure web applications.

bullets: Developed and deployed responsive full-stack web applications using modern frontend and backend technologies.
Collaborated with the development team to implement application features, optimize performance, and improve user experience.
Gained hands-on experience in software development workflows, debugging, API integration, and database management.
experience.desc: Developed and deployed responsive full-stack web applications. Collaborated with the development team to implement features and optimize performance. Gained experience in API integration and database management.

bullets: Conducting malware analysis, vulnerability assessments, and threat hunting activities to identify security risks and attack patterns.
Performing reverse engineering and AI-based threat detection research to enhance cybersecurity analysis and incident response capabilities.
Working with SIEM tools, network analysis, and security monitoring techniques in SOC-focused environments.
experience.desc: Conducting malware analysis, vulnerability assessments, and threat hunting. Performing reverse engineering and AI-based threat detection. Working with SIEM tools and SOC systems.

projects.title: SOCSight Log-Based Intrusion Detection System
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Intrusion Detection System
projects.desc: An AI-powered security information and event management (SIEM) dashboard that monitors network traffic and system logs. Integrates Google Gemini API for intelligent anomaly detection, automated threat classification, and real-time security alerts.

projects.title: Web Defacment Lab
projects.subtitle: Interactive Integrity Simulation Lab
projects.desc: Built a realistic web application with user flows like flight search, authentication, and an admin dashboard — then intentionally introduced controlled vulnerabilities in an isolated environment to study how web defacement and other common attacks actually happen. From broken access control and weak input validation to insecure file handling and auth flaws, we explored issues from both the attacker’s perspective and the defender’s responsibility.
